autoDeleteWarning: Items deleted over 30 days ago are automatically permanently deleted.

softDeleteDialog.title: Move to Trash
softDeleteDialog.description: The item will be removed from active lists but can be restored from trash.
softDeleteDialog.body: This does not permanently delete the item. All data remains available for recovery.

permanentDeleteDialog.title: Permanently Delete
permanentDeleteDialog.description: The item will be permanently removed if no blocking dependencies exist.
